summary: Session 21 testing complete. ALL 201 TESTS PASSING across 15 test files. Verified new regression guards for: (1) mapImageAssets - 9 tests covering role tagging (logo/hero/reference), 4-image cap, data URI prefixing, first-of-≤2-is-logo heuristic, (2) buildAssetsFileContent - 7 tests covering LOGO_URL/HERO_URL/REFERENCE_N exports, backtick/$ escaping, valid JS output, (3) buildWaveSystemPrompt - 6 tests verifying HARD RULE #15 (router cleanliness/no duplicate navbars), #16 (use provided image assets), #17 (brand copy discipline), (4) reviewBuild prompt - 3 tests confirming router-renders-navbar-causing-duplicates flag, ignored-user-logo/hero flags, generic-marketing-copy flag.

PASS: mapImageAssets caps at 4 images to respect token budget
PASS: mapImageAssets uses 'first of ≤2 is logo' heuristic for unnamed images
PASS: mapImageAssets prefixes data: URIs correctly by extension (png/jpg/webp/svg)
PASS: mapImageAssets preserves existing data: URIs without re-prefixing
PASS: buildAssetsFileContent returns valid JavaScript with LOGO_URL/HERO_URL/REFERENCE_N exports
PASS: buildAssetsFileContent escapes backticks and $ characters inside data URLs
PASS: buildWaveSystemPrompt contains HARD RULE #15 (ROUTER CLEANLINESS - no Navbar in router)
PASS: buildWaveSystemPrompt contains HARD RULE #16 (USE PROVIDED IMAGE ASSETS)
PASS: buildWaveSystemPrompt contains HARD RULE #17 (BRAND COPY DISCIPLINE)
PASS: buildWaveSystemPrompt includes USER-PROVIDED IMAGE ASSETS context block only when imageAssets populated
PASS: reviewBuild prompt flags ignored-user-logo and ignored-user-hero-image
PASS: All 15 test files pass (201/201 tests)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Session 21 complete. New regression guards added for duplicate navbar, ignored logo uploads, and generic copy issues. mapImageAssets + buildAssetsFileContent extracted to lib/ai/brief-utils.js. buildWaveSystemPrompt exported from lib/ai/brief-builder.js with HARD RULES 15/16/17. reviewBuild prompt in lib/ai/brief-reviewer.js has rules 8/9/10 for router/image/copy checks. Jest suite now at 201/201 tests across 15 files. All tests are pure unit/prompt tests - no DB, no LLM, no HTTP required.
